overview: I converted my Feature Spec Generator CLI into a Streamlit web app, deployed it to Streamlit Cloud, wired MS Teams webhook notifications, and rolled it out to my PM team in 5 days. By end of Day 5, I had 12 completed specs and a full backlog of user feedback.

keyPoints.title: App deployed live with public URL in under 10 minutes
Shipped v1 over v2 — user feedback now drives v3
Teams webhook took 10 minutes, generated 12 spec notifications Day 5
Session state and st.rerun() are the core of Streamlit flow
Secrets management and repo wiring were the hardest parts
